name: Horizon Payday Loans Los Angeles
description_short: Horizon Payday Loans Los Angeles offers financial advisory services including personal financial planning, budget management, and expert consultation to help clients achieve financial stability.
description_long:
Horizon Payday Loans Los Angeles operates as a financial advisory firm based in Los Angeles, California, located at 617 W 7th St Suite 1592. Despite its name suggesting payday lending, the company's website content focuses exclusively on financial advisory and counseling services rather than loan products. The company claims over 500 clients served, 10+ years of experience, and a 98% client satisfaction rating.

The firm offers three primary service categories: personal financial planning with customized goal-setting, budget management assistance to maximize income and control expenses, and one-on-one financial consultations. Clients can work with dedicated financial advisors to develop tailored strategies aligned with both short-term and long-term financial objectives. All services appear to be delivered through consultation-based advisory relationships rather than financial products.

The company emphasizes personalized service delivery, claiming that every client receives individualized attention from a dedicated financial advisor. They highlight fast decision-making and timely advice as key differentiators. The firm positions itself as accessible to consumers who may not have previously had access to quality financial guidance, adopting a client-first approach that prioritizes understanding individual needs before providing recommendations.

A significant caveat is the discrepancy between the company name (suggesting payday lending) and actual services offered (financial advisory only). No loan products, payday advances, or emergency cash options are described on the website. The company's online presence lacks detailed advisor credentials, specific methodologies, or third-party certifications (such as NFCC membership or non-profit status). Potential clients should verify credentials and regulatory standing before engaging services.
address: 617 W 7th St Suite 1592, Los Angeles, CA 90017

company_info.headquarters: 617 W 7th St Suite 1592, Los Angeles, CA 90017

pros: Claims personalized one-on-one financial consultation with dedicated advisors
Offers customized personal financial planning aligned with short and long-term goals
Provides budget management assistance focused on maximizing income and controlling expenses
Reports 10+ years of experience in financial advisory services
Fast decision-making and timely advice delivery emphasized
Located at physical address in downtown Los Angeles with phone contact available
cons: Company name misleadingly references 'payday loans' but provides no loan products or emergency cash services
Website lacks credentials, certifications, or proof of advisor qualifications (no CFP, non-profit status, or NFCC membership mentioned)
No information about fee structure, pricing, or cost of advisory services
Generic website content lacks specific examples, case studies, or detailed service descriptions
No regulatory disclosures, licensing information, or third-party oversight documentation visible
best_for: Consumers seeking personalized financial planning and goal-setting assistance
Individuals needing help developing effective budgeting strategies and expense management
Los Angeles-based clients preferring local in-person or phone-based financial consultation
diagnosis: Horizon Payday Loans Los Angeles is best for consumers seeking general financial advisory services and personalized budgeting assistance in the Los Angeles area. The primary caveat is the lack of documented credentials, transparent fee information, and third-party certifications—prospective clients should independently verify the firm's regulatory status and advisor qualifications before paying for services.
services: Personal financial planning with customized short and long-term goal alignment
Budget development and management strategy assistance
One-on-one financial consultation and advisory services
In-person consultation at physical Los Angeles office location
